arts.ttl: Four Observations from Bayern Munich’s frustrating 2-2 draw with Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Max Beier put Dortmund ahead at the start of the second half, only for Bayern to gain the advantage through two quick goals by Raphaël Guerreiro and an absolute beauty by Serge Gnabry, Unfortunately, Waldemar Anton soon levelled the score as the game ended all square and Bayern missed a golden opportunity to go 8 points clear of reigning champions Bayer Leverkusen atop the table. While he didn’t take full advantage of that tonight, it goes to show yet again that if Kimmich is to do what he does best without slowing down play or becoming a potential defensive liability, playing in the spaces he did today with Olise ahead and Laimer behind him is the way forward.

arts.ttl: Kompany on wild draw with Dortmund: "I'd buy a ticket for a game like that"
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany has reflected on his team's entertaining draw against Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Kovac reacts to Bayern draw: "We achieved what we wanted"
arts.sum: Niko Kovac has declared himself satisfied with Borussia Dortmund's draw with Bayern Munich, saying "we achieved what we wanted".

arts.ttl: Match Awards from Bayern Munich’s disheartening 2-2 draw to Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: There were a few players in Bayern’s backline who played decently, and Raphaël Guerreiro took his goal well, but it's another industrious performance from Konrad Laimer that snatches this award. With the lack of minutes Thomas Müller has been awarded this season, it can be easy to forget just how impactful the player can be when allowed to start games and have ample time to establish himself in the match.

arts.ttl: Müller rues missed chances after Bayern's draw against Dortmund
arts.sum: Bayern Munich striker Thomas Müller lamented missed opportunities following Saturday's 2-2 draw with Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: West Ham among clubs to have made contact over £47m Bayern Munich player
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that West Ham United and Fulham are among the Premier League clubs that have made contact over Bayern Munich’s Joao...

arts.ttl: Neuer expected to miss Bayern's Champions League return leg against Inter
arts.sum: Max Eberl doesn't expect Manuel Neuer to be fit for Bayern's Champions League quarter-final second leg clash with Inter.

arts.ttl: Inzaghi ‘got angry’ with Inter player, but ‘confident’ for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Simone Inzaghi admits he ‘got angry’ with one of his Inter players during the 3-1...

arts.ttl: MOTM Poll: Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich Fight to a Draw at the Allianz Arena
arts.sum: It would have been nice to win all three points, but a draw is still a huge result, and BVB fought hard for it. It was a proper brawl, but BVB claimed a hard-fought point in Der Klassiker.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich held by Borussia Dortmund in thrilling Klassiker spectacle
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and Borussia Dortmund played out an enthralling 2-2 draw in Der Klassiker, keeping the title race wide open in the final five games of the season. The Allianz Arenaprovided the stage for another enthralling edition of Der Klassiker as Bayern and Dortmund battled to a 2-2 draw.
